description: Wire the escalation machinery at the composition root (#120), part 1 of 3: SchedulerFactory.Create CONSTRUCTS + INJECTS the run-level escalation components (FileEscalationSink, CriticalityJudge, BlockerRetry) into the Scheduler ONLY when the plan carries an autonomy block under autonomyPolicy:auto (byte-identical/inert when absent), and Scheduler accepts them + performs classify-then-act at the needs-human/wave-checkpoint gate (GateClassifier.Classify → escalate via the sink / CriticalityJudge best-guess / BlockerRetry for class-(b) transients). writeScope spans SchedulerFactory.cs + Scheduler.cs because the factory-construct and the Scheduler-accept-params are one compile unit under repo-wide TreatWarningsAsErrors.
